title: Find My Device - Playing sound from 2 different devices
scenario: "Find My Device" tone fails with error on second paired headset when multiple devices are connected in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Pair and connect two Bluetooth audio devices (e.g., Poly headsets) to the app.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the first connected device to enter Device Settings.
4. Navigate to the 'Find My Device' feature (e.g., under Device Settings or Notifications).
5. Tap 'Play Tone' on the first device and confirm the tone plays correctly.
6. Return to the Home screen and tap on the second connected device to enter its Device Settings.
7. Navigate to the 'Find My Device' feature for the second device.
8. Tap 'Play Tone' on the second device.
expected: The tone plays audibly on the second connected device.
